# Hamster

> Hamster is an AI-native product planning workspace where humans and AI teammates share context, align on briefs, and ship together.

## Home

- https://tryhamster.com/: Home

## Concepts

- https://tryhamster.com/concepts/ai-native-sdlc: Ai Native Sdlc
- https://tryhamster.com/concepts/briefs-not-tickets: Briefs Not Tickets
- https://tryhamster.com/concepts/context-graph: Context Graph
- https://tryhamster.com/concepts/humans-and-agents: Humans And Agents
- https://tryhamster.com/concepts/velocity-gap: Velocity Gap

## Product: Studio

- https://tryhamster.com/product/studio/agents: Agents

- https://tryhamster.com/product/studio/sync: Sync
- https://tryhamster.com/product/studio: Studio
